title: API Keys
subtitle: Manage CLI authentication keys for your account.

empty.title: No API keys yet
empty.description: Create a key to authenticate the CLI with your account.

error.load: Failed to load API keys. Please try again.

createDialog.title: Create API key
createDialog.description: Give your key a name to identify it later.
createDialog.warning: This secret will only be shown once. Copy it now and store it safely.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API key?
revokeDialog.description: The key "{name}" will be permanently revoked. Any CLI sessions using it will stop working immediately.
